programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
14/26. Tha deagh chabhag air na seanganan an-diugh. The ants are in a great hurry today.
33/52. Chan eil AH-AH ann an deagh shunnd an-diugh agus, gu dearbh', tha e gabhaltach. AH-AH isn't in a good mood and it seems to be contagious.
1/26. While out picking blackberries, Célestine finds an old mill covered in ivy. Ernest claims that the building is haunted. Instead of scaring Célestine, it piques her curiosity.
9/52. Tha Posy ag iarraidh itealag Pip fheuchainn ach chan eil cùisean a dol leatha! Posy want to try Pip's kite but things don't go her way!
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 29/52. Neep's friends and relations come for a visit, but their digging soon causes a few problems around the island.
9/26. Owl wants to enter a drawing contest, but fears his work is not good enough.

programmes.show_name: SPFL League 1 - Montrose v Alloa Athletic
programmes.show_description: Football coverage from League 1 as Montrose host Alloa Athletic. All the action live, with commentary from Alex O'Henley.
3/8. Ramsay is on his bike for an adventure taking in the sights and history of East Lothian. Ramsay air a bhaidhseagail a'siubhal tro sheallaidhean is eachdraidh Lodainn an Ear.
4/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
2/6. An old office in Inverness gets a modern make-over, with the aid of strong colours, black steel and a little CAD cutting technology.
1/4. Màiri Anna NicUalraig a' lìbhrigeadh prògram-ciùil bho Celtic Connections 2026. Featuring performances from Fras, RURA, Niamh Corkey, Darrell Scott, plus Evelyn and Dec.
3/4. The Terai region is at the foot of the Himalayas, where Bengal tigers live in numbers.
6/33. Còmhlan indie rock à Alba, Kassidy air Àrd-Ùrlar a' Ghàrraidh air là 1 de Belladrum 2025. Scottish indie rockers Kassidy play the Garden Stage on day one. Contains strong language.
1/2. Tha Catrìona NicNèill aig Farpaisean Chòmhlan Pìoba na Cruinne le còmhlain ìre a h-aon 2024. Carrie MacNeil presents Grade 1 performances from the World Pipe Band Championships.
